chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ أَسْخَطَ الْخَالِقَ فِي مَرْضَاةِ الْمَخْلُوقِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – The one who Angers the Creator for pleasing the creatures

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/411)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/411)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ طَلَبَ مَرْضَاةَ النَّاسِ بِمَا يُسْخِطُ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ كَانَ حَامِدُهُ مِنَ النَّاسِ ذَامّاً .

en.hubeali: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The one who seeks the pleasure of the people with what Angers Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, his praisers from the people would become his condemners’.
en.sarwar: 3. The narrator of the previous Hadith through his chain of narrators has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, Those who seek to please people by means of things that displease Allah, the most Majestic, the most Glorious, people praising him turn to blame him.’”
